chapter: Chapter: Vaigyanik Chetna ke Vahak: C.V. Raman (Prose)

questions.question: C.V. Raman ki samudri yatra ne unke man mein kaun sa vaigyanik prashn paida kiya?
questions.answer: Unhonne socha ki samudr ke pani ka rang neela hi kyon hota hai, jabki pani swayam rangheen hai.

questions.question: Raman se pehle neele rang ke peeche Lord Rayleigh ne kya tark diya tha?
questions.answer: Lord Rayleigh ke anusar samudr ka neela rang akash ke neele rang ke paravartan (reflection) ke karan tha.

questions.question: C.V. Raman ne Lord Rayleigh ke tark ko kaise galat siddh kiya?
questions.answer: Unhonne pramanit kiya ki samudr ka neela rang pani ke anuon (molecules) dwara prakash ke prakeernan (scattering) ke karan hai.

questions.question: ‘Indian Association for the Cultivation of Science’ sanstha ka Raman ke jeevan mein kya mahatva tha?
questions.answer: Isi sanstha ki chhoti si prayogshala mein Raman ne apne mahan vaigyanik prayog aur khoj ki thi.

questions.question: Raman ne apni sarkari naukri (Finance Dept) ko kyon tyaga?
questions.answer: Kyonki ve apna poora samay aur urja vigyan ki khoj aur anusandhan (research) mein lagana chahte the.

questions.question: Raman Effect (Raman Prabhav) ka mool siddhant kya hai?
questions.answer: Jab ek-rangiya prakash ki kiran kisi dravya (liquid) se guzarti hai, to uske rang mein parivartan hota hai jo anuon ki sanrachna darshata hai.

questions.question: Raman ne sangeet ke vadhyayantron par kya shodhan kiya?
questions.answer: Unhonne siddh kiya ki mridangam aur tabla jaise bhartiya vadhyayantra vaigyanik dristi se atyant unnat aur surile hain.

questions.question: Raman Effect ki khoj ne rasayan shastra (Chemistry) mein kya kranti layi?
questions.answer: Isse dravyon ki aantik sanrachna (Internal Structure) ko samajhna bahut asan ho gaya.

questions.question: Raman ko Nobel Puraskar milne se Bharat ka maan kaise badha?
questions.answer: Ve Nobel jitne wale pehle bhartiya aur pehle ashiayi vaigyanik bane, jisne duniya mein bharat ki dhak jamayi.

questions.question: Raman ke anusar vigyan ki pragati ke liye kya avashyak hai?
questions.answer: Ve mante the ki upkaranon se zyada vaigyanik ki jigyasa aur pratibha mahatvapurna hai.

questions.question: 28 February ko 'Rashtriya Vigyan Diwas' kyon manaya jata hai?
questions.answer: Kyonki isi din 1928 mein C.V. Raman ne apne mahan 'Raman Prabhav' ki ghoshna ki thi.

questions.question: Raman ne kin 'paschimi dharanaon' (Western Myths) ko toda?
questions.answer: Ki bhartiya vadhyayantra pashchimi vadhyayantron ki tulna mein avaignyanik hain.

questions.question: Raman ko 'Bharat Ratna' kis varsh mila tha?
questions.answer: Unhone 1954 mein Bharat Ratna se sammanit kiya gaya.

questions.question: C.V. Raman ke pita ne unke vaigyanik vyaktitva mein kya yogdaan diya?
questions.answer: Unke pita ne unhe bachpan se hi Ganit aur Bhautiki ke prati ruchi aur adhaar pradan kiya.

questions.question: Raman ne 'Kolkata Vishwavidyalaya' mein kaun sa pad swikar kiya?
questions.answer: Unhonne vahan Bhautiki ke Professor ka pad swikar kiya.

questions.question: Raman Effect ka upyog aaj ke samay mein kahan hota hai?
questions.answer: Aaj iska upyog cancer ki pehchan, dravyon ki shuddhata aur anuon ke adhyayan mein hota hai.

questions.question: Raman ko kis tarah ki suvidhaon ki kami ka samna karna pada?
questions.answer: Unke paas adhunik upkaran aur badi prayogshalaon ka abhav tha.

questions.question: Raman ke anusar 'prakriti' kya hai?
questions.answer: Ve prakriti ko ek khuli kitab aur rahasiyon ka pitara mante the.

questions.question: Raman ne kis vishay mein apni pehli research paper likhi thi?
questions.answer: Unhonne 'Prakash ke vivartan' (Diffraction of light) par pehla paper likha tha.

questions.question: Raman ne Bangalore mein kis sanstha ki sthapna ki?
questions.answer: Unhonne 'Raman Research Institute' ki sthapna ki.

questions.question: Raman ki khoj ne 'Quantum Theory' ko kaise mazboot kiya?
questions.answer: Isne pramanit kiya ki prakash ke photon anuon se takrane par urja ka adan-pradan karte hain.

questions.question: Raman ke vyaktitva ki sabse badi visheshata kya thi?
questions.answer: Unka atma-vishwas aur unka swadeshi vigyan ke prati prem.

questions.question: Raman ne 'Finance Department' ki naukri kyon ki thi?
questions.answer: Kyonki us samay bharat mein vigyan ko career ke roop mein apnane ki suvidha kam thi.

questions.question: Raman Effect ka sabse bada labh kya hai?
questions.answer: Vastuon ko bina nasht kiye unki rasayanik banawat ka pata lagana.

questions.question: Path ke anusar Raman 'Vaigyanik Chetna ke Vahak' kaise hain?
questions.answer: Kyonki unhone bharat mein vaigyanik soch ko jagaya aur logon ko anusandhan ke liye prerit kiya.
